title: A Method to Analyze the Sectoral Impact of Fiscal Support for COVID-19 Affected Economies: The Case of Oceania

summary.about: How fiscal stimulus changed the pandemic’s economic and industry-level effects across eight Oceania economies.
summary.audience: Finance ministries, central banks and economic-development policymakers in Oceania.
summary.method: Uses a global CGE model with IMF projections and country stimulus packages to compare pandemic scenarios.
summary.insights: Stimulus cushioned GDP losses, especially in New Zealand and Guam, but education, tourism and skilled employment remained heavily affected.
